top_signals.title: Trump Says US Killed Tren de Aragua Leader Niño Guerrero
top_signals.summary: The US has killed the leader of the Tren De Aragua drug cartel, Niño Guerrero, in a strike that was coordinated with Venezuela, President Donald Trump said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
